aboutBillableRatesDescription: Billable rates determine how much to charge for tracked time. There are 5 levels of billable rates, each overriding the previous one:
workspaceRateLevelDescription: the default rate for all time entries in the workspace
workspaceMemberRateLevelDescription: overrides the workspace rate for a specific member
projectRateLevelDescription: overrides workspace-level rates for all entries in a project
projectMemberRateLevelDescription: overrides the project rate for a specific member
taskSpecificRateLevelDescription: overrides all other rates for a specific task
aboutLaborCostsDescription: Labor costs represent the internal cost of a team member's time. Use them alongside billable rates to calculate profit margins. Labor costs follow the same 5-level hierarchy as billable rates but are only visible to workspace admins.
workspaceMemberRateAndLaborCost: Workspace member rate and labor cost
workspaceMemberRateDescription: Set individual billable rates and labor costs for each workspace member. Member rates override the workspace-level rate.
